emailVerificationSent: A verification email has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and follow the link to complete registration. The link is valid for 24 hours.
registrationLinkExpired: Your registration link has expired. Please register again to receive a new verification link.
fillDetailsToComplete: Please fill in your details to complete your registration.
eventJoinedSuccess: You have successfully joined the event!
eventLeftSuccess: You have successfully left the event.
confirmDeleteEvent: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
profileLoadError: Failed to load profile. Please try again.
noLocationsFound: No locations found. Try a different search term.
passwordResetEmailSent: If the email exists, a password reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox. The link is valid for 1 hour.
passwordResetSuccess: Password has been reset successfully! You can now log in with your new password.
passwordResetInstructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you instructions to reset your password.
resetPasswordDescription: Enter your new password below. Make sure it's strong and secure.
noEventsCreated: You haven't created any events yet. Create your first event to get started!
noParticipatingEvents: You are not participating in any events yet. Discover events to join!
noArchivedEvents: You don't have any past events.
noEventsAvailable: No public events available at the moment.
nearbyEventsDescription: Discover events happening near your saved location.
noNearbyEvents: No events found within the selected radius. Try increasing the search radius.
noEligibleEvents: No events available that match your profile. Try adjusting your search radius or check back later.
eligibleEventsDescription: Discover events that match your profile and preferences.
foundEligibleEvents: Found events that match your profile
noDefaultLocationSet: You haven't set a default location yet. Go to Settings to save your preferred city, or use your current location below.
addBirthDateForAgeRestriction: To set age restrictions, you need to add your birth date in your profile settings first. Without it, your event will be open to all ages.
mustBeVerifiedToUseThisFeature: You must be a verified user to use this feature.
editConstraintsInfo: Some options are limited based on current participants
cannotChangeGenderMixed: Cannot change gender restriction when event has mixed genders
cannotReduceMaxAttendance: Cannot reduce max attendance below current participants
cannotRequireVerificationUnverified: Cannot require verification when unverified participants exist
moderationBlockedMessage: Your message contains inappropriate content and has been blocked.
moderationWarningMessage: Your message contains language that may be considered inappropriate. Please be respectful in your communication.
moderationConsequenceWarning: Repeated violations may result in temporary or permanent suspension of your messaging privileges.
yourMessageWasDeleted: Your message was deleted by moderation
messageWasDeleted: A message was removed by moderation
accountDeleted: Your account has been successfully deleted. You will be logged out shortly.
accountDeletedWithDetails: Account deleted successfully. {cancelledEvents} events cancelled, {leftEvents} events left, {emailsSent} notifications sent.
deleteAccountInfoTitle: What will happen when you delete your account:
deleteAccountInfoDeleted2: All events you created will be cancelled
deleteAccountInfoDeleted3: You will leave all events you're participating in
deleteAccountInfoPreserved1: Your messages in chats (shown as 'Deleted User')
deleteAccountPasswordHelp: Enter your current password to proceed
deleteAccountFinalConfirm: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
confirmBlockParticipant: Are you sure you want to block
ageRangeLimitedByParticipants: Age range limited by participants: {minAge}-{maxAge} years
genderRestrictionDisabledMixedGenders: Gender restriction disabled due to mixed genders in participants
genderRestrictionDisabledNoGender: Gender restriction disabled - some participants haven't set their gender
cannotRequireVerifiedUsers: Cannot require verified users - event has unverified participants
maxAttendanceLimitedByParticipants: Max attendance cannot be less than {count} (current participants)
profileEditConstraintsInfo: Some profile fields cannot be changed due to events you have created
cannotChangeGenderDueToEvents: Cannot change gender - you have created events with gender restrictions
cannotChangeBirthDateDueToEvents: Cannot change birth date - you have created events with age restrictions
